series_metadata.series_description: This record series consists of applications for licensure that have been withdrawn at the request of the applicant, applications closed due to applicant abandonment, and administratively closed applications.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: paper copy converted electronic format. Once machine readable version verified as an accurate copy, shred paper copies. ; Electronic: one year request withdraw is granted, or when application is considered closed, through abandonment or administratively
